Click a device to view & edit properties.

Quick start:
1. Click device button → adds to canvas
2. Select mode → drag to reposition
3. Link mode → click A then B
4. Right-click for context menu
5. Double-click to rename inline
6. Sim tab → run ping simulation

🏓 Ping Simulator
Select source & destination to simulate the packet path through your topology. OSPF check verifies neighbor adjacency.
Source Device
Destination Device
Protocol
Ready — build topology & run simulation...
Keyboard Shortcuts
V Select   L Link
Del Delete   Esc Cancel
Ctrl+Z Undo   Dbl-click Rename
Scroll Zoom   Space+drag Pan
F Fit all nodes
How to Use
1. Click device button → adds to canvas
2. Select → drag to reposition (grid-snap)
3. Link mode → click source then dest
4. Right-click for context menu
5. Click device → Props tab to edit
6. Sim tab → run ping simulation
7. Presets load real CCNA topologies
Link Legend
━ Ethernet 100M/1G
┅ Serial / WAN T1/DS3
◇ Fiber / 10G
≋ WAN / MPLS cloud
⫶ 802.1Q Trunk
Status Indicators
🟢 Bright glow = device Up
🔴 Red ring = device Down
⚠️ Yellow ring = Degraded
On links: dashed red = Down
Ready — add devices from the Devices panel, then use Link mode to connect them Nodes: 0 Links: 0 Mode: Select
